title: wolfhsm: algorithm() panics where sign() returns Unavailable
description: Calling algorithm() on WolfHsmBackend panics (lib:95-100) while sign(), get(), put(), public_key_der() all return SecretError::Unavailable. A caller that calls algorithm() before signing to choose a codec will crash instead of getting a graceful error. This is the only method in the entire codebase that panics in a production code path.
